backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of random sensitivity value generation in SensitivityPopup.tsx with specified ranges for gaming settings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend components describing the passkey authentication flow, device name input, and random sensitivity generation functionality.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining dark theme variables for backgrounds, borders, and UI elements with monochrome palette.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with title 'ENZOxSENSI' and root div mounting the React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component orchestrating authentication flow between PasskeyScreen, DeviceNameScreen, and SensitivityPopup with header/footer layout and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/DeviceNameScreen: Form component for capturing device name input with validation and Generate button that triggers the sensitivity popup.
frontend/src/components/PasskeyScreen.ts: Authentication screen with password input validating against hardcoded passkey 'enzonvrfall' and Instagram follow prompt for access.
frontend/src/components/SensitivityPopup: Dialog component generating random sensitivity values (General: 50-200, Red Dot: 50-150, 2x: 100-250, 4x: 100-250) using useMemo with isOpen dependency to regenerate on each popup open.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook managing ICP actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, handling actor lifecycle and query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication managing login state, identity storage, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file as the application uses only client-side logic without backend queries.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes using OKLCH color space, including variables for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar components with a gaming aesthetic.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that sets up the root render with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, wrapping the main App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH color mappings, container settings, border radius variables, custom shadows, and accordion animations, plus typography and container query plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document describing ENZOxSENSI, a mobile app with passkey authentication ('enzonvrfall') that generates random device-specific sensitivity settings, featuring instant transitions, black/red theme, and client-side validation only.
